title: [ AP/AR /GL System Enhancement and Integration ] Assistant Manager, Finance System Project Management (2-Year Contract) UP 6K #HYT
description:
Sector: Healthcare / Finance Systems
Salary: Up to $6,000 per month
Contract Type: 2 Years

This role reports to the Head of Finance and supports the organisation in enhancing its Finance systems, particularly the Business Central (BC) platform and related modules.

Key Responsibilities:

AP Module Enhancements

  • Set up audit trails and approval workflows for vendor master amendments
  • Enhance PR/PO system with budget allocation
  • Link vendor summaries to supplier details in AP ageing reports

AR Module Enhancements

  • Link customer summaries to AR ageing reports
  • Improve Statement of Account (SOA) formats

Other System Enhancements

  • Enhance GST reporting
  • Link trial balance to GL codes and transactions
  • Set up audit trails and approvals for donor creation
  • Enhance donor communication templates
  • Track restricted donations
  • Encrypt payment and GIRO files
  • Manage data migration between HR and Finance systems
  • Support vendor evaluation workflows
  • Link fixed asset additions and depreciation to GL
  • Automate reminder letters
  • Interface bank receipts from payment platforms into the finance system

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Finance, Accountancy, or related discipline
  • At least 5 years of experience in finance system enhancement or integration

All qualified applicants, please click “ APPLY NOW”

Or you may send in your resume to:

Whatsapp: https://wa.me/+6597430026  

Email : kimlow@recruitexpress.com.sg

Kimmy Low Yi Ting (Kim) | CEI Registration Number: R23112122

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
